channel.title: Ntfy on Gabriel Volpe
channel.description: Recent content in Ntfy on Gabriel Volpe

item.title: Immich Memories Notifications
item.description:
One of the most beloved features Immich offers (also Google Photos) is memories. It temporarily transports us back in time to cherish our old precious photos and videos once again. However, we need to remember to open the app on a daily basis to do so — there’s no baked in notification system that would remind us.

This is another heavily-requested feature, and if you check out that discussion, you’ll find a couple of vibe-coded solutions like this python script or this dockerized application. None of them felt right to me, though.
